titleStmt.title: SII 5.300: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 300. (A.R. No. 12 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumaṭantai yum puvimaṭantaiyum puyattiruppa nāmaruviya kalaimaṭantaiyum jayamaṭantaiyum nalañcirappak koḷārnta ciṉaippuliyuṅ koṭuñcilai
yuṅ kulaintoḷippa vāḷārnta poṟkirimel varikkayalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa Iruṅkaṭal valaiyat tiṉitaṟam perukak karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappa Oru kuṭainiḻa liruni
laṅ kuḷira muvvakaittamiḻu muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai vetamu naviṉṟu ṭaṉ vaḷara Aivvakai veḻviyuñ ceyviṉai yiyaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camayamu maḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa
Eḻuvakaip pāṭalu miyaluṭaṉ parava Eṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ cakkarañ cellak koṅkaṇar [�]ṅkar kocalar māḷavar ciṅkaṇar teliṅkar ciṉar kuccarar villavar makatar vikkalar cempiyar
pallavar mutaliyar pāṟttivarellām muṟaiviṭa maruḷeṉa voruvarmuṉoruvar muṟaimuṟai kaṭavat tiṟaikuṇan tiṟaiñca Ilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭi Intiraṉ pūṭṭiya polaṅkatirāra mārviṉiṟa poliya paṉi
malaṟt tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuneṟi taḻaippamaṇimuṭi cūṭip poṉṉicūḻṉāṭṭu puli yāṉai poyakalak kaṉṉicūḻṉāṭṭuk kayal viḷaiyāṭa
veḻamum parappit tañcaiyu muṟantaiyuñ centaḻal koḷutti kāviyum nilamu niṉṟu kavaṉiḻaṟṟa nilaṉaḻittuk kūṭamu māmatiluṅ kopuramu māṭāṅku māṭamu māḷikaiyum maṇṭapamum palavi
ṭittut toḻutu vantaṭaiyār nirupar tantokaiy Aḻuta kaṇṇīr Āṟu (pa)parappik kaḻutaikoṇṭuḻutu c cempiyaṉaic ciṉam piriyap porutu curampuka voṭṭiyum poṉ maṇimuṭi paṟittu
p pāṇaṉukkuk kuṭuttaruḷip pāṭaruñ ciṟappiṟ paruti vāṉṟoyum Āṭakap puricai Āyirattaḷiyiṟ coravaḷava ṇṭapattu virar Apiṣekañceytu pukaḻ virittu nāḷum pararācar nāmantalai
viṭuvittu miḻuna tarukaṇmatacāṉaimelkoṇṭu nirāḻivaiyyamuḻutum potuvaḻitta kūrāḻiyañ melkoṇṭu poyaṭaiyapaṭāta varumaṟai tontaṇar vāḻ teyvappuliyūr
tiruvellaiyiṟ pukku poṉṉampalam poliya Āṭuvār pūvaiyuṭaṉa maṉṉun tirumeṉi kaṇṭu maṉaṅkaḷittuk kolamalarme layaṉuṅ kuḷirtuḻāy mālum malaṟ cevaṭi vaṇaṅki vāṅku meṟ yiloḻiya vaṇ ṭeḻuppum pū[ṅkamalavāvicūḻ
p poṉṉamarāpatiyil Ottulakan tāṅkum māmeruvai koṇantu vaittaṉaiya cotimaṇimaṇṭapat tiruntu colaimalippuṉaṟ coṇāṭu tāṉiḻantu tāmālai tara varukaveṉ ṟaḻaippa poṉmuṭiyun vāḷakirik kappuṟattup poṉvaḷava ṉurimai
yoṭum pukuntu peṟṟa putalvaṉai niṉpereṉṟu muṉkāṭṭi veṟṟiyariyaṇaik kiḻ viḻuntu toḻutirappat tāṉoṭi muṉṉiḻanta vemmai Ellāṅ kaiyyakalat tāṉotakam paṇṇit taṇṭār muṭiyuṭaṉota liṭantaṉamār veḷaikkut tiriyaviṭṭapaṭikke
ṉṟu mitu piṭipāṭākaveṉa poṅkutirai ñālattup pūpālar toḷviḷaṅkuñ ceṅkayal koṇṭuḷaṟun tirumukamum paṇṭiḻanta coḻapatiyeṉṉu nāmamun tolnakarum miḷa vaḻaṅki viṭaikoṭu kaikkatir vaṭaventar tampāta meka
t talaipaṇiya virakaḻa laṇintu viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi virasiṁhāsa ṉattu vaḻaṅkeḻu kavari Irumaruṅ kacaippa kaṭaleṉa muḻaṅkuṅ kaḻinalliyāṉai vaṭapulaventar maṇippuyam piriyā Ilakukuḻai Aruvaiyar toḻa ḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaru
ḷiya śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa [tiribhu] vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭuvaḻa[ ṅkiyaruḷiya śrīsundara pāṇ] ṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 9 vatu pākanūṟkūṟṟattu brahmade yam śrīcoḻakulāntakaccatu rvvedi maṅkalattu ru-ceri kuṇṭur śrīvāsude
yāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu tenkallakanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār śrīmulasthā ṉamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār koyilil caṇḍeśvara ppiḷḷaiyār civanāmattāl viṟṟukuṭutta nilamāvatu 9- ñceriyil kūttan kaṇṇanuḷḷiṭṭa vari vvūr
tirukkaṭavūr piramaṇi naṅkaiyāṇṭāḷccāni pakkal En ma Āma 9 ñceri tiruveḷḷaṟai kauṇiyaṉ śrīpuraṅkoccirāman vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyaṉā yaṉubha vittu Avanilam pilā vaḷḷaṟai malaikuṉiyaniṉṟān tanma pakkal va
dā ṉam peṟṟu Aṉupavittu Ivaṉpakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭu A[ ṉubha vittu] māvatu Arumoḻitevappilāṟṟukku meṟku di vākaravatikkut teṟku 3-9 10 1- pāṭakam ṭaiya ru-ḷai Idvādaśa kattu tirukka
nārāyaṇabha ṭṭaṉ pakkalum Ivan tampi piramaṇiyan cirāmaṉ pakkalum koṇṭuṭaiyaṉā yaṉubha vittum Ivaṉiṟ pinpu(t) tiruveḷḷaṟai The end of the record is lost.
Digital edition of SII 5.300 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
